/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-Map,/Users/adampage/Ambiq/neuralspot/neuralspotx/examples/power_benchmark/build/power_benchmark.map -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m55 -mfloat-abi=hard -nostartfiles -static -fno-exceptions -Wl,--gc-sections,--entry,Reset_Handler -Wl,--wrap=_write_r -Wl,--wrap=_close_r -Wl,--wrap=_lseek_r -Wl,--wrap=_read_r -Wl,--wrap=_kill_r -Wl,--wrap=_getpid_r -Wl,--wrap=_fstat_r -Wl,--wrap=_isatty_r -T/Users/adampage/Ambiq/neuralspot/neuralspotx/examples/power_benchmark/linker_script_itcm.ld CMakeFiles/power_benchmark.dir/src/main.c.o -o power_benchmark  _nsx/nsx_power/libnsx_power.a _nsx/nsx_cmsis_startup/libnsx_startup.a _nsx/nsx_harness/libnsx_harness.a _nsx/nsx_utils/libnsx_utils.a _nsx/nsx_core/libnsx_core.a /Users/adampage/Ambiq/neuralspot/neuralspotx/examples/power_benchmark/modules/nsx-ambiqsuite-r5/sdk/lib/apollo510/evb/libam_bsp.a _nsx/nsx_ambiq_hal_r5/libnsx_ambiq_hal.a /Users/adampage/Ambiq/neuralspot/neuralspotx/examples/power_benchmark/modules/nsx-ambiqsuite-r5/sdk/lib/apollo510/libam_hal.a -Wl,--start-group -lm -lc -lgcc -lnosys -lstdc++ -Wl,--end-group
